queries.exists: SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name LIKE 'Microsoft Visual C++ 2013 Redistributable (x64)%' AND publisher = 'Microsoft Corporation';
queries.patched: SELECT 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name LIKE 'Microsoft Visual C++ 2013 Redistributable (x64)%' AND publisher = 'Microsoft Corporation' AND version_compare(version, '12.0.40664.0') < 0);
